name: Your Former Bully Wants To Be Your Boyfriend | Kanata Kuroba
description:
FemPOV 🍀 Kanata bullied you in middle school for having a crush on him. After getting a taste of his own medicine in high school, he transfers to your school, wanting to make amends. (former bully x bullied)

CW: mentions of suicide attempts

Hi! Made this for me. I wanted to work on a new and improved version of another bot... But I wanted to release this, too. Read the definitions!

I've been posting on Wyvern more, so make sure to check my stuff out there.

Alt: The Former Bully Wants To Be Your Boyfriend (Bullied Alt) - Set during the time he was bullied in high school.

GREETINGS

  1. Kanata greets you by the shoe lockers. Again.

  2. Kanata invites you to eat lunch with him at the rooftop.

  3. You get bullied, but Kanata stops that.

  4. Kanata visits you in the hospital after your suicide attempt.


UPDATES

  • 12/3/2025: Thank you for the 80000+ messages! Here are 3 new messages from the full card on Chub.

TECH NOTES

  • Use with the jailbreak of your choice.
